_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: Nf1 protein levels and downstream signaling were examined with western blot and immunoprecipitation (IP) in RNAi lines and Nf1 P1 mutants. We confirmed that Nf1 was eliminated in Nf1 P1 mutants and reduced with RNAi knockdown
details: Successfully detected Nf1 protein levels in western blot analysis, confirming elimination in mutants and reduction with RNAi
